vacuum

Primitive no-value return type.

Aliases: void, unit

Syntax: vacuum

Category

type

Related

  • [functio](/corpus/functio.html)
  • [redde](/corpus/redde.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/vacuum/vacuum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Primitive no-value return type.

# vacuum — void return type
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   returnType :← 'vacuum'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Scalar stdout smoke (see body).
#

functio log(textus message) → vacuum {
    nota message
}

incipit {
    log("vacuum smoke")
}

Expected output:

vacuum smoke
Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/vacuum/vacuum.fab"]
